case_title: SANTORA, LILLIAN et al vs. NEWT, LYNN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTORA, LILLIAN SANTORA, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWT, LYNN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 326 HEAD ST, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEWT, LYNN

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF JUN-07-1993 CLAIM SETTLED PER COURT'S SUGGESTION AND AGREED BY PARTIES. (1) CLAIM IS DENIED; (2) RONNIE NEWT WILL BE ADDED AS DEFT IN JUDGMENT; (3) EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT STAYED THRU JUNE 22, 1993 ONLY, CLAIMANT HAVING PAID $450. TO PLAINTIFF, PER DIEM FOR 15 DAYS OF PREMISES AT 326 HEAD ST, SAN FRANCISCO.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTORA, LILLIAN SANTORA, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWT, LYNN $1,804.12 RENT, $288.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,092.62, DEFENDANT RONNIE NEWT ADDED AS DEFENDANT PER COURT ORDER OF 6/8/93.
